content.title: Welcome
content.content: Swaagatam — Welcome

content.title: Choose Language:
content.content: Select your preferred language for the course

content.title: I am the Brahmi Script.
content.content: Extremely ancient, immensely significant, and most beloved!

content.title: What is your goal?
content.content: What is your goal?

content.title: My brief introduction
content.content: Would you like to know?
I am the script created by Aadi Brahma, the first Tirthankara, Maharaja Shri Rishabhdev Ji.
He created me while teaching his daughter Brahmi.
Along with Brahmi, Maharaja Shri Rishabhdev Ji also taught 'Ank Vidya' (Mathematics) to his second daughter Sundari.

content.title: Propagation
content.content: Both of them extensively propagated the knowledge bestowed upon them by Lord Shri Rishabhdev Ji.

content.title: Why was I named 'Brahmi Lipi'?
content.content: Princess Brahmi shared the knowledge of this script with the common people — that is why I came to be called 'Brahmi Lipi'.

content.title: I am not a language!
content.content: Remember — I am not a language; I am only a system of writing.

content.title: What is Bhasha (Language)?
content.content:
The medium through which we express our thoughts and feelings to one another is called a 'language'.

Examples: Hindi, Punjabi, Bengali, Telugu, Tamil, Gujarati, Kannada, Odia, English, etc.

content.title: What is Lipi (Script)?
content.content:
The medium used to write any language is called a 'script'. OR: The symbols used to represent spoken sounds in written form are called a 'script'.

Language → Script:
Hindi → Devanagari
Punjabi → Gurmukhi
Bengali → Bengali
Telugu → Telugu
Tamil → Tamil
Gujarati → Gujarati
Kannada → Kannada
Odia → Odia
English → Latin (Roman)

content.title: My Specialty
content.content: I am originally the script of the Prakrit language.

content.title: Versatility
content.content: However, just like Devanagari or Latin/Roman script, I can be used to write any language.

content.title: Secret Script
content.content: And yes, let me share a secret with you — you can make me your personal secret script and keep all your secrets hidden from ordinary people!

content.title: My Importance
content.content:
• My vowels and consonants are just like Devanagari (Hindi).

• I can connect you directly to Tirthankara Shri Rishabhdev Ji.

content.title: Please, do not leave my side.
content.content: I will make every effort to connect you directly to Tirthankara Rishabhdev Ji Maharaja — because today, I alone am the true living memory of the Tirthankara Lord.

content.title: I know what you are thinking.
content.content: The scriptures we have are called Jinvani — meaning the divine voice of the Jinas.

content.title: Alas — the Tirthankaras are no longer physically present among us.
content.content: Yes, you are absolutely right. But consider this — the scriptures we hold, those very texts are what we regard as the form of Jinvani and revere.

content.title: Tradition
content.content: The divine voice of the Lord was woven by the Ganadharas and handed to the Acharyas; through tradition, only a little has reached us.

content.title: Not Direct Jinvani
content.content: But that is not the direct Jinvani — it is Jinvani in the form of tradition.

content.title: Divine Touch
content.content: Having crossed an immeasurable journey of countless ages since Lord Shri Rishabhdev Ji's nirvan, I stand before you today — carrying memories of infinite ages, sacred unbroken knowledge, and the divine touch of Lord Rishabhdev.

content.title: How much time would you like to give me each day for learning?
Wow!
content.content:
Wow! That means you can learn the complete Brahmi script in very little time.

Come! Let us begin from the very beginning.
